name: @remote-codex/vscode-extension
description: Use Codex from your phone with a secure relay and explicit local approvals.

remoteCodex.relayUrl.description: Websocket URL the desktop extension itself uses to reach the relay.

remoteCodex.mobileRelayUrl.description: Optional relay URL embedded into the phone pairing link. Leave empty to auto-derive a LAN URL from the desktop relay URL.

remoteCodex.mobileUrl.description: Optional URL of the phone web client used for QR pairing. Leave empty to auto-derive a LAN URL on port 4173.

remoteCodex.permissions.readWorkspace.description: Whether the phone can read workspace snapshots, file previews, and git diffs.

remoteCodex.permissions.runCodex.description: Whether the phone can ask the desktop to run Codex in read-only planning mode.

remoteCodex.permissions.runInspectionCom.description: Whether the phone can run allowlisted local inspection commands.

remoteCodex.permissions.applyPatch.description: Whether the phone can request a local patch review panel. Applying still requires a local button click.

remoteCodex.commandAllowlist.description: Exact local commands the phone may invoke. Commands must be simple executable-plus-args entries with no pipes or redirects.

remoteCodex.codex.model.description: Optional model override passed to the local codex CLI.

remoteCodex.codex.extraArgs.description: Additional arguments forwarded to codex exec.
